attempts.prompt:
## Better Together identity variations - Round 4.1 app icon
- Deliverable: ONE finished square app-icon source, straight-on, centered, and filling the square canvas.
- Brand meaning: two people intentionally tending one living relationship.
- Audience: modern couples who want an emotionally intelligent relationship app, not a therapy clinic, wedding product, or dating app.
- Style: premium editorial wellness identity; confident, memorable, warm, modern; crisp flat vector-master geometry with slight human-cut irregularity; no photorealism.
- Palette: ONLY warm paper #FAF8F5, coral #E5533A, deep forest #113B36, and saffron #D99A3D.
- Composition: one dominant centered silhouette; 18 percent optical safe margin; two to five foreground groups; strong contrast and readable geometry at 20 px.
- Source requirements: TRUE full-bleed square background with every corner filled; NO pre-rounded app-icon mask, rounded-square border, inset tile, transparency, mockup, device, label, caption, or presentation board.
- Originality: create an original Better Together identity. Do not imitate or reproduce any competitor, trademark, or existing app icon.
- NO gradients, glow, bevel, 3D, shadows, scenery, landscape, literal people, faces, hands, infinity sign, chain link, puzzle pieces, wedding rings, yin-yang, or decorative border.
- Text rule: when the direction requests letters, render ONLY the exact uppercase letters "BT". When the direction does not request letters, render NO text.

Use the attached approved-family source only to preserve its Better Together identity territory, warm palette, optical weight, and human-cut edge character. Create materially different geometry. Do not trace, duplicate, or merely recolor the attached mark.

## Direction - Heart Bridge
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: one unmistakable upright heart constructed from TWO separate thick shapes in the central 60 percent.
- Left shape: coral #E5533A forms the full left lobe and descends toward the lower center, stopping before the point.
- Right shape: deep forest #113B36 forms the full right lobe and descends toward the lower center, stopping before the point.
- The halves do not touch at the top or bottom and remain visibly independent.
- Connection: one short, thick saffron #D99A3D horizontal bridge spans the center gap at exactly mid-height. Give it softly rounded ends.
- The total silhouette MUST read as a heart immediately.
- NO circle seed, letters, pulse line, infinity, chain, arrow, ring, hands, faces, extra hearts, border, or badge.

## Required correction

The previous render was rejected because: The centered connector looked like a medical bandage or capsule. Remove every pill, capsule, white outline, and medical cue. Keep two clean open heart halves, then connect them only with one small saffron organic curved bridge at the lower third, shaped like a short shallow smile with no outline and no enclosing white shape.

Correct that failure while preserving the named direction, palette, and app-icon composition. Produce a materially cleaner replacement.
